title: narcissus radiiflorus subsp. poetarum
intro: Narcissus radiiflorus subsp. poetarum, also known as poet's narcissus, is a species of flowering plant in the Amaryllidaceae family. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its alkaloid content, which has been shown to have antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of poet's narcissus include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and even exhibit potential anticancer properties. Herbal preparations of poet's narcissus can be made into a tea or tincture, often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, although its use should be approached with caution due to potential toxicity.
